positive: Minimalist and highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. Focus on interlocking geometric forms resembling ancient, bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main elements should feature stylized crescent moons, abstracted constellations, and floating geometric islands. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, glowing gold, and matte obsidian. Composition should be circular and centered, maximizing negative space for print versatility. Style should be high-contrast linework combined with crisp flat color blocks, resembling modern Japanese Ukiyo-e meets sacred geometry. Studio lighting, perfect silhouette, perfect print quality.
negative: blur, noise, grain, artifacts, low quality, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, poor contrast
